name: TOPdesk Service Management API
what_it_does: TOPdesk REST API for enterprise service management (ESM) platform covering IT, facilities, and HR service delivery. Enables AI agents to manage service desk incidents and requests, handle facilities management tickets, manage assets and configuration items, automate change management workflows, access knowledge base articles, track SLA compliance, and integrate service management data with ERP and HR systems.
use_cases: Managing IT service desk tickets and routing from service management agents
Handling facilities and building maintenance requests from facilities agents
Tracking IT and facilities assets from asset management agents
Automating change request workflows from IT governance agents
not_for: MSP multi-client management without enterprise service desk focus
Customer-facing CRM without internal employee service management
Project management without ITIL service delivery workflows
best_when: An enterprise using TOPdesk for IT, facilities, or HR service management wants AI agents to automate ticket triage, routing, SLA monitoring, and integration with ERP and HR systems.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: IT and facilities change management capabilities — automated changes to systems and facilities require proper authorization controls.

auth.notes: TOPdesk supports application password (API key) and OAuth 2.0. Application passwords tied to TOPdesk user accounts. OAuth for third-party integrations. Scopes control access to modules (incidents, assets, changes). On-premises and SaaS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise service management pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-agent monthly pricing; module-based licensing (ITSM, CAFM, HR)
pricing.notes: Dutch company (Delft, Netherlands). Founded 1993. Veteran European ITSM vendor. Strong in Benelux, Germany, and UK. Enterprise service management spanning IT, facilities (CAFM), and HR. On-premises and SaaS cloud.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: IT and facilities change management requires proper authorization
No public MCP server — REST API with app password or OAuth2
Dutch company — GDPR compliance; EU data residency default
Multi-module platform (ITSM + CAFM + HR) — API surfaces vary by module
On-premises vs SaaS have different API configurations
NEN7510 compliance for Dutch healthcare organizations — additional requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: IT and facilities management data. ISO27001, GDPR, NEN7510. API key and OAuth2 with scopes. EU/US data residency. Dutch company.

security_score_components.security_notes: IT and facilities management data. ISO27001, GDPR. API key and OAuth2. EU/US data residency. Dutch enterprise service management.
